content_body:
Whitepath Golf Club is a public golf course located 5 miles north of Ellijay, Georgia, just 1.5 hours north of Atlanta.

The 8-acre Whitepath Lake and the Ellijay River along with several other creeks and ponds spread out along the course.

The course is challenging to the low-handicap golfer yet friendly to those with higher handicaps.

Beautiful rolling terrain and long-range views of the surrounding Blue Ridge Mountains and the Cohutta Wilderness make this course one of the most enjoyable and picturesque golf courses in North Georgia.

The course offers small, fast-bent greens that are carefully maintained for your golfing pleasure.
title: Whitepath Golf Course
